# CloseButton

A pre-styled button with an X (close) icon, commonly used to dismiss or close modals, drawers, alerts, toasts, and other dismissible UI elements.

## Import

```jsx
import { CloseButton } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the close button |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "subtle" \| "outline" \| "ghost" \| "plain"` | `"ghost"` | The visual style variant |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette to use |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the button |
| `onClick` | `function` | - | Click event handler |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<CloseButton onClick={() => onClose()} />
```

### Sizes

```jsx
<CloseButton size="xs" />
<CloseButton size="sm" />
<CloseButton size="md" />
<CloseButton size="lg" />
```

### In a modal header

```jsx
<Dialog.Header>
  <Dialog.Title>Settings</Dialog.Title>
  <CloseButton onClick={onClose} />
</Dialog.Header>
```

### In an alert

```jsx
<Alert.Root>
  <Alert.Title>Update available</Alert.Title>
  <CloseButton size="sm" onClick={onDismiss} />
</Alert.Root>
```

### With variant

```jsx
<CloseButton variant="outline" />
<CloseButton variant="subtle" />
```

## Features

- Pre-configured with an X (close) icon
- Commonly used in modals, drawers, alerts, toasts, and banners
- Supports multiple sizes and visual variants
- Includes accessible ARIA attributes by default
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
